info.title: Cherry Studio API
info.description: OpenAI-compatible API for Cherry Studio with additional Cherry-specific endpoints

BearerAuth.description: Use the API key from Cherry Studio settings

model.description: The model to use for completion, in format provider:model-id

accessible_paths.description: Array of directory paths the agent can access
Array of directory paths the agent can access

UpdateAgentRequest.description: Partial update - all fields are optional

agent_id.description: Primary agent ID for the session

accessible_paths.description: Array of directory paths the agent can access

UpdateSessionRequest.description: Partial update - all fields are optional

post.description: Creates a new autonomous agent with the specified configuration and automatically provisions an initial session that mirrors the agent's settings.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all agents
Retrieves a specific agent by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing agent with the provided data

patch.description: Partially updates an existing agent with only the provided fields

max_steps.description: Maximum steps the agent can take

schema.description: Only include the fields you want to update

delete.description: Deletes an agent and all associated sessions and logs

post.summary: Create a new session for an agent
Create a new message in a session

delete.summary: Delete a message from a session

404.description: Agent, session, or message not found

post.description: Create a chat completion response, compatible with OpenAI API

get.description: Get a list of all configured Model Context Protocol servers
Get detailed information about a specific MCP server

post.description: Proxy endpoint for Model Context Protocol communication with a specific MCP server. Accepts all HTTP methods (GET, POST, DELETE, etc.).
Create a message response using Anthropic's API format

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

post.summary: Create message with provider in path
post.description: Create a message response using provider ID from URL path

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

get.description: Returns a list of available AI models from all configured providers with optional filtering

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of models to return

total.description: Total number of models (when using pagination)

get.description: Get basic API information and available endpoints
